name: Americana Key Lime Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon grated lime peel to top
A few drops of green food coloring
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix gelatin, 1/2 cup sugar, and salt in a saucepan.
2. Beat together egg yolks, lime juice, and water; stir into the gelatin mixture.
3. Cook over medium heat just until the mixture boils.
4. Remove from heat; stir in grated peel.
5. Add food coloring sparingly to tint pale green.
6. Chill, stirring occasionally, until the mixture mounds slightly when dropped from a spoon.
7. Beat egg whites until soft peaks form; gradually add 1/2 cup sugar, beating to stiff peaks.
8. Fold gelatin mixture into egg whites.
9. Fold in whipped cream.
10. Pile into cooled baked pastry shell.
11. Chill until firm.
12. Spread with more whipped cream; edge with grated lime peel.
13. Sprinkle chopped pistachio nuts in the center.
14. Garnish with thinly sliced limes placed around the edge of the pie.
